title: Artraise Type 90 Filters for Vax Mach Air Lift Stretch Pet Max Hoover Vacuum Cleaner, 3 Pack Premium Pre & Post Motor HEPA Filter Set Replacement Kit for Vax
features: Artraise Type 90 filter for vax helps to improve the suction of the vacuum cleaner, such as pollen, pet dander, dust mites and smoke effectively, providing you a clean house and fresh air.

Fits models: Our Type 90 Replacement Filters For Vax fit for the following models: Mach Air U91-MA-BE; Air Lift U84-AL-PE, U84-AL-PME, U84-AL-Ue; U85-AS-Be/Ce/Pe/Te/Ue/Pme/Ppe; U87-MA-PE, U88-MA-Se, U89-MA-TE, U89-MA-Le/Te/Pfe, U90-MA-RE, U91-MA-Be.

For Vax Type 90 filter fit UCA1GEV1, UCA2GEV1, UCA3GEV1, UCCEGEV1, UCW1GEV1, VRS115, VRS116, CDUP-PLXP, CDUP-PLXS, CDUP-ADXA, CDUP-ADXS, UCSUSHV1, UCUESHV1, UCPESHV1, UCPMSHV1. DOES NOT FIT HOOVER VACUUM CLEANERS. Please double check the Model Number is listed above prior to purchase. Compares to filter for Vax kit Type 90 (part # 1-1-134227-00 / 1113422700) .

Contains:3 Type 90 Pre-Motor Filter for Vax, 3 Type 90 Post-Motor HEPA Flter for Vax, 1 Brush. In order to keep Filters maintain for vax's cleaning, we suggest to changing Foam & Felt Filter every 3 months.

Long lasting reliability: Crafted from superior-grade components, this filter for vax set is engineered for endurance. Its high-caliber design guarantees sustained functionality, delivering peak filtration effectiveness and effortless upkeep over a prolonged timeframe.
